benefits.description: While on Retatrutide, OP reports not thinking about ex-girlfriend and not dreaming about her

side_effects.description: After stopping Retatrutide for 2-3 weeks, OP experienced intrusive thoughts about ex-girlfriend multiple times daily and recurring dreams, which OP found disturbing

protocol_notes: OP has been off Retatrutide for approximately 2-3 weeks at time of posting. No dose or administration details provided.
